global.title: U.S. military boards an Iranian-flagged oil tanker - NBC News
global.summary: U.S. forces boarded an Iranian-flagged oil tanker, signaling another sharp turn in already fragile regional tensions.
global.whyItMatters: This is a flashpoint for prayer, peacemaking, and wise pastoral attention to fear and instability in the Middle East.

global.title: Evacuations ordered amid threat of Calif. chemical explosion - NBC News
global.summary: Authorities ordered evacuations in California over the threat of a chemical explosion, highlighting the vulnerability of communities during sudden emergencies.
global.whyItMatters: Pastors often help people process anxiety and disruption after disasters; this is a reminder to lead with calm, prayer, and practical care.

global.title: Week Ahead for FX, Bonds: U.S. PCE Data, Middle East Developments in Focus - WSJ
global.summary: Markets are watching inflation data and Middle East developments closely, with investors bracing for possible economic and geopolitical ripple effects.
global.whyItMatters: Economic uncertainty shapes household stress, generosity, and congregational needs, so this helps frame pastoral awareness of financial pressure.

canadian.title: New Consumer Reports investigation finds nearly 400 reports of exploding glass oven doors in U.S. - CTV News
canadian.summary: A new investigation highlights hundreds of reports of glass oven doors shattering, raising fresh household safety concerns that may also affect Canadian consumers.
canadian.whyItMatters: Practical safety issues matter pastorally too, especially for families, seniors, and anyone facing unexpected home repair costs.

persecutedChurch.title: Israeli strikes on southern Lebanon kill 19, including children and women, officials say - AP News
persecutedChurch.summary: Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon reportedly killed 19 people, including women and children, deepening suffering in a region where Christian communities also live under chronic pressure.
persecutedChurch.whyItMatters: This invites informed prayer for civilians, churches, and fragile communities caught in cycles of violence.

persecutedChurch.title: Who on Earth Feels Threatened by a Nun? - Haaretz
persecutedChurch.summary: An opinion piece in Haaretz argues that attacks on Christians in Jerusalem, the West Bank, and Lebanon are becoming disturbingly common.
persecutedChurch.whyItMatters: It is a sobering reminder to pray for vulnerable believers and to teach the church to notice hostility toward Christians beyond headline conflicts.

leadership.title: Truly Human Leadership's Next Chapter - IndustryWeek
leadership.summary: This piece argues that trust, kindness, emotional intelligence, and honest communication are not soft extras but the foundation of healthy leadership and community.
leadership.whyItMatters: It offers a useful leadership lens for church staff, volunteers, and elders: people flourish where they are treated with dignity and truth.

goodNews.title: Some schools are teaching kindness classes: "Makes me want to be a better person" - CBS News
goodNews.summary: Some schools are intentionally teaching kindness, and students say the classes are shaping how they treat others.
goodNews.whyItMatters: This is a hopeful cultural story pastors can echo: formation in compassion is possible, and small habits of love still matter.
